queries.question: What data sources are common across all meteorological offices? Give me the names and descriptions
queries.sql: SELECT Data_Sources.source_type, Data_Sources.description  from Meteorological_Offices_Data_Sources join Data_Sources on Meteorological_Offices_Data_Sources.data_source_id = Data_Sources.id join Meteorological_Offices on Meteorological_Offices_Data_Sources.meteo_office_id = Meteorological_Offices.id   GROUP BY Meteorological_Offices_Data_Sources.data_source_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Meteorological_Offices_Data_Sources.meteo_office_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Meteorological_Offices)

queries.question: Give me the data sources (and their descriptions) we have for every meteorological office
queries.sql: select meteorological_offices.name , data_sources.source_type , data_sources.description from Meteorological_Offices_Data_Sources join Data_Sources on Meteorological_Offices_Data_Sources.data_source_id = Data_Sources.id join Meteorological_Offices on Meteorological_Offices_Data_Sources.meteo_office_id = Meteorological_Offices.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?source_type ?description WHERE {
  ?meteorological_offices_data_sources a :Meteorological_Offices_Data_Sources .
  ?data_sources a :Data_Sources .
  ?meteorological_offices_data_sources p:hasData_Sources ?data_sources .
  ?meteorological_offices a :Meteorological_Offices .
  ?meteorological_offices_data_sources p:hasMeteorological_Offices ?meteorological_offices .
  ?meteorological_offices p:name ?name .
  ?data_sources p:source_type ?source_type .
  ?data_sources p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: What data sources do all meteorological offices use?
queries.sql: SELECT Data_Sources.source_type  from Meteorological_Offices_Data_Sources join Data_Sources on Meteorological_Offices_Data_Sources.data_source_id = Data_Sources.id join Meteorological_Offices on Meteorological_Offices_Data_Sources.meteo_office_id = Meteorological_Offices.id   GROUP BY Meteorological_Offices_Data_Sources.data_source_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Meteorological_Offices_Data_Sources.meteo_office_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Meteorological_Offices)

queries.question: What are the descriptions of data shared across all meteorological offices?
queries.sql: SELECT Data_Sources.description  from Meteorological_Offices_Data_Sources join Data_Sources on Meteorological_Offices_Data_Sources.data_source_id = Data_Sources.id join Meteorological_Offices on Meteorological_Offices_Data_Sources.meteo_office_id = Meteorological_Offices.id   GROUP BY Meteorological_Offices_Data_Sources.data_source_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Meteorological_Offices_Data_Sources.meteo_office_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Meteorological_Offices)

queries.question: Show me the data source that each meteorological office uses.
queries.sql: select meteorological_offices.name , data_sources.source_type from Meteorological_Offices_Data_Sources join Data_Sources on Meteorological_Offices_Data_Sources.data_source_id = Data_Sources.id join Meteorological_Offices on Meteorological_Offices_Data_Sources.meteo_office_id = Meteorological_Offices.id

PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?source_type WHERE {
  ?meteorological_offices_data_sources a :Meteorological_Offices_Data_Sources .

  ?meteorological_offices a :Meteorological_Offices .
  ?meteorological_offices_data_sources p:hasMeteorological_Offices ?meteorological_offices .
  ?meteorological_offices p:name ?name .
  ?data_sources p:source_type ?source_type .
}

queries.question: For each meteorological office, list descriptions of data used.
queries.sql: select meteorological_offices.name , data_sources.description from Meteorological_Offices_Data_Sources join Data_Sources on Meteorological_Offices_Data_Sources.data_source_id = Data_Sources.id join Meteorological_Offices on Meteorological_Offices_Data_Sources.meteo_office_id = Meteorological_Offices.id

PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?description WHERE {
  ?meteorological_offices_data_sources a :Meteorological_Offices_Data_Sources .
  ?data_sources a :Data_Sources .

  ?meteorological_offices a :Meteorological_Offices .
  ?meteorological_offices_data_sources p:hasMeteorological_Offices ?meteorological_offices .
  ?meteorological_offices p:name ?name .
  ?data_sources p:description ?description .
}

Show me the data source that each meteorological office uses.
